title: sedum ignescens
intro: Sedum ignescens, also known as the "living fire," is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of sedum ignescens include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, sedum ignescens is often used to make salves, ointments, and infusions that can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
